zh.lifeSummary: 當Ludwig I. von Arnstein於大約1040年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯希爾巴可洛斯特 阿恩斯坦時，他的父親Arnold II. von Arnstein26歲，母親Kunigunde von Sargans15歲。他於1057年與Guda van Zutphen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1084年在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 德根多福奧分格納斯奧享年45歲，埋葬在德國賀瑟拉-迪利-可萊斯維茲拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ludwig I. von Arnstein于大约1040年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲海-拉-可萊斯希爾巴可洛斯特 阿恩斯坦时，他的父亲Arnold II. von Arnstein26岁，母亲Kunigunde von Sargans15岁。他于1057年与Guda van Zutphen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1084年在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 德根多福奧分格納斯奧享年45岁，埋葬在德国賀瑟拉-迪利-可萊斯維茲拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Arnstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from either of two places in northern Bavaria named Arnstein (‘eagle's crag’).

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When Ludwig I. von Arnstein was born about 1040, in Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Arnold II. von Arnstein, was 26 and his mother, Kunigunde von Sargans, was 15. He married Guda van Zutphen in 1057. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died in 1084, in Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 45, and was buried in Wetzlar, Lahn-Dill-Kreis, Hesse, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ludwig I. von Arnstein est né environ 1040, à Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Arnold II. von Arnstein, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde von Sargans, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Guda van Zutphen en 1057. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1084, à Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Wetzlar, Lahn-Dill-Kreis, Hessen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ludwig I. von Arnstein um 1040 in Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnold II. von Arnstein 26 und seine Mutter Kunigunde von Sargans 15. Er hat 1057 Guda van Zutphen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1084 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Wetzlar, Lahn-Dill-Kreis, Hessen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig I. von Arnstein è nato il circa 1040 nel Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Arnold II. von Arnstein, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Kunigunde von Sargans, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Guda van Zutphen nel 1057. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1084, nel Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Wetzlar, Lahn-Dill-Kreis, Hessen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Ludwig I. von Arnsteinが約1040年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズルヘイン-ラン-クレイスセエルバチクロスター アルンステインで生まれた時，父Arnold II. von Arnsteinは26歳，母Kunigunde von Sargansは15歳であった。1057年にGuda van Zutphenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1084年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス デグジェンドルフオフエンバーグナッサウで45歳で死去し，ドイツヘセンラン-デル-クレイスウエトズラーにて埋葬された。

ko.Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-K: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-라h-크레이스 시바치 클로스터 아른스타인

ko.Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-K: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-라h-크레이스 시바치 클로스터 아른스타인
ko.Hirscher, Germany: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 레이븐스버그 보드네그 허슈어
ko.lifeSummary: Ludwig I. von Arnstein(이)가 대략 1040년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-라h-크레이스 시바치 클로스터 아른스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnold II. von Arnstein(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Kunigunde von Sargans(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1057년 Guda van Zutphen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1084년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 디겐도르프 펜버그 나소에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 헤센 라h-디-크레이스 w츠라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig I. von Arnstein nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Arnold II. von Arnstein, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Kunigunde von Sargans, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Guda van Zutphen em 1057. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1084, em Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Alemanha, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Wetzlar, Lahn-Dill-Kreis, Hessen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ludwig I. von Arnstein родился около 1040 г. в местности клостир арнстин, силбач, раин-лахн-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Arnold II. von Arnstein было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde von Sargans, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Guda van Zutphen в 1057 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1084 г. в местности нассау, оффенбирг, ландкрис дегендорф, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности вецлар, лахн-диллькрис, Гессен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ludwig I. von Arnstein nació aproximadamente 1040, en Kloster Arnstein, Seelbach, Rhein-Lahn-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Arnold II. von Arnstein, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Kunigunde von Sargans, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Guda van Zutphen en 1057. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió en 1084, en Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Wetzlar, Lahn-Dill-Kreis, Hessen, Alemania.
